text: Morning Jarvis. Can you give me a quick briefing for Saturday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, March 22. No work meetings today. You have working on the garage cabinetry and Ethan's soccer practice scheduled.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. Busy day for sports! I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Meal planning saves so much time. Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Planning a street block party soon. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! Catan is always a good time. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: The lawn mower is having issues starting. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Home maintenance is a constant cycle. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Screen time is always a negotiation. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Listening to a podcast in the garage. It was a really interesting history episode. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. Personal time is valuable. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Reading scientific papers late tonight. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! I've indexed the research notes. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've got the schedule covered. I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: Sarah found a new recipe to try. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. I've got the grocery list ready. Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Having dinner with our friends tonight. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! Catan is always a good time. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, The lawn mower is having issues starting. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. Let's get that resolved. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Good planning. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Listening to a podcast in the garage. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. Personal time is valuable. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, Modified the smart-home alert integrations. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. That is a clean implementation. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Relaxing Sunday spending time with Sarah and the kids. Had a great catch-up with the neighbors. Had a great catch-up with the neighbors. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
